$description: MFB Brand Tokens (W3C Design Token Community Group format). Canonical source of truth: Figma 'My First Bitcoin_Full Brand Assets' (file mFIc75UUSyftaqnNUQgjLX). This file is the code-side mirror of the Figma variables; edit it ONLY to match Figma, never the other way around.

purple-300.$description: Primary purple — brand hero color, backgrounds, headers

purple-400.$description: Accent dark purple — deep contrast, footer backgrounds

purple-200.$description: Accent light purple — secondary headings, gradient endpoint

orange-300.$description: Primary orange — CTAs, highlights, Bitcoin symbol color

orange-400.$description: Accent dark orange — hover/active states, strong emphasis

orange-200.$description: Accent light orange — soft highlights, secondary accents

black.$description: Primary black — high-contrast text, bold headlines

white.$description: Primary white — backgrounds, text on dark surfaces

gray-900.$description: Neutral — near-black, body text on light backgrounds

brand.$status: DEPRECATED 2026-07-14: this gradient appears nowhere in the canonical Figma file. It only exists in the Variables collection we bootstrapped ourselves. Kept for compatibility; phase out.

heading.$description: Headings, titles, display text — Medium weight

mono.$status: DEPRECATED 2026-07-14: IBM Plex Mono appears nowhere in the canonical Figma file (all 26 tabs checked, incl. type specimen + Archive). Kept for compatibility with live pages using font-mono; phase out during page work. Do not use in new designs.

h1.$description: Heading 1 — IBM Plex Sans Medium, line-height: 1

h2.$description: Heading 2 — IBM Plex Sans Medium, line-height: 1

h3.$description: Heading 3 — IBM Plex Sans Medium, line-height: 1

h4.$description: Heading 4 — IBM Plex Sans Medium, line-height: 1

h5.$description: Heading 5 — IBM Plex Sans Medium, line-height: 1.1

h6.$description: Heading 6 — IBM Plex Sans Medium, line-height: 1.1

body.$description: Body text — IBM Plex Sans Regular, line-height: 1.2

label.$description: Labels — IBM Plex Sans Regular, line-height: 1.2

quote.$description: Block quotes — IBM Plex Sans Medium, line-height: 1

$verification: Verified against the live Figma brand book on 2026-07-14: all 17 color tokens present as rendered fills, IBM Plex Sans confirmed. Ongoing: verify-brand-tokens.mjs runs weekly via the brand-figma-watch systemd timer and fails loudly on drift. Open design questions logged there: IBM Plex Mono and the brand gradient do not visibly appear in the current brand book (pending ruling).
